meta.title: mobiqo — a small mobile studio
meta.description: mobiqo is a small software studio designing and building iOS apps. One focus: mobile.

hero.subtitle: mobiqo is a small team designing, building and shipping iOS apps. We do one thing — and we try to do it well.

services.title: One focus: mobile apps.
services.body: We're not a web agency. We don't have a long list of services. The only thing we do is iOS apps — from idea to App Store and beyond. A new idea, an unfinished codebase to take over, or an existing product to grow — the conversation is always the same.

items.title: Native iOS
items.desc: Modern apps built with Swift and SwiftUI, true to Apple's platform guidelines.

items.title: App Store launch
items.desc: Submission, review responses, ASO and launch — handled in-house.

items.title: Post-launch support
items.desc: Launch isn't a delivery point. We stick around as long as the product lives — bug fixes, iOS updates, new features.

process.title: Five steps. Few but clear.
process.subtitle: No surprises. At every stage we tell you what's happening, what we're doing and why.

steps.title: Discover
steps.desc: We talk through the problem. Who is this for, what behavior are we trying to change, what does success look like?

steps.title: Design
steps.desc: Flows, prototypes, micro-interactions. From paper to Figma to clickable prototype.

steps.title: Build
steps.desc: Daily progress in Swift. Weekly TestFlight builds, fast feedback loops.

steps.title: Launch
steps.desc: App Store submission, review responses, App Store optimization, launch plan.

steps.title: Sustain
steps.desc: Post-launch: user feedback, bug fixes, new iOS compatibility, new features.

capabilities.title: What we use.
capabilities.subtitle: A modern stack that keeps us fast, simple and safe on the mobile side.

about.title: A small studio. A clear vision.
about.body_1: mobiqo is a small software studio of a few people. We exist to turn complex problems into simple, fast and beautiful mobile products.
about.body_2: We design, build and maintain our products end-to-end. Design, engineering and product strategy under one roof — same room, same desk, same head.

values.title: Simplicity
values.desc: Less but right. Every screen serves a purpose.

values.title: Performance
values.desc: Fast, fluid and reliable. Users hate waiting — so do we.

values.title: Craft
values.desc: Beautiful gets used. Design matters as much as the product itself.

values.title: Longevity
values.desc: Our products live as long as they're used, not just until ship day.

stats.title: We're just getting started.
stats.subtitle: No inflated numbers. Where we are, honestly:

items.q: How long does building a mobile app take?
items.a: Depends on scope, but a typical v1 takes 2-4 months. A smaller MVP can ship in 6-8 weeks; a larger product can run 6+ months.
For now, yes. We don't want to add Android until we can do it well. Focusing on one platform keeps the quality bar high.
Every project is different. Instead of a fixed price list, we discuss scope and build a plan together. We aim to be transparent and clear.

items.q: Can you take over an existing codebase?
items.a: Yes. Auditing an existing Swift project, fixing what's missing and moving it forward is one of the things we do.
Yes — an NDA is standard on every project. You can ask for one before sharing your idea.
We work via monthly or project-based support agreements. Sticking around while the product lives in the App Store is just part of the job.

contact.title: Let's talk.
contact.subtitle: An idea, an unfinished codebase, or just a hello — write to us. We'll reply within 24 hours.

form.name: Name
form.subject: Subject
form.message_placeholder: What would you like to tell us?
form.success_body: Your message reached us. We'll be in touch soon.
form.error_body: We couldn't process your message right now. You can email us directly:
